steps.title: Identify the core instruction
steps.content: The student wants to CONTRAST the two NWRs — meaning to show how they differ.

steps.title: Find the choice that contrasts them
steps.content:
Choice C does this with “While the Mason Neck NWR is in Virginia, on the Atlantic coast, the Coachella Valley NWR is in California, on the Pacific coast.” The word while signals the contrast, and the geographic details show the differences.

The other three either avoid comparing the two refuges or highlight a shared feature (protecting endangered species) instead of a difference.

That matches choice C — C is correct.
